Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for Scott Hodges.

The Court stated that the only issue is whether it should impose a bond, explained what its reading is of Probate Code 8465 is and stated that it has to impose a bond particularly in these circumstances unless it finds good cause to excuse it. Ms. Alavi stated that she is fine with having a bond, that the idea was to save costs and that the Beneficiaries are the Parents of the Decedent. Ms. Alavi also stated that she talked with the Mother, that she introduced the Mother to several Professional Fiduciaries and that the Mother chose Mr. Hodges. In addition, Ms. Alavi stated that there is a $400.00 creditor's claim, ordinary bills and minimal living expenses of $1,000.00 that is owed. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration. Scott Hodges is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $187,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 4, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2021 Continued To Mar-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
